brief: US 30-yr fixed mortgage monthly payment using P&I formula M = P·r(1+r)^n/((1+r)^n−1). Inputs: home price, down payment %, loan term (15/20/30), interest rate (default 6.8% for 2026), property tax %, home insurance/yr, PMI if down<20%. Output: total monthly payment + breakdown (principal, interest, taxes, insurance, PMI), total interest over life of loan, payoff date.

Auto loan monthly payment calc with sales tax, trade-in, down payment. Inputs: vehicle price, trade-in value, down payment, sales tax %, loan term months (36/48/60/72), APR (avg 2026: 7.5% new / 11.5% used). Output: monthly payment, total interest, total paid, amortization first 12 months.

Federal/private student loan payoff time given extra payments. Inputs: balance, APR, current monthly payment, extra payment/mo. Output: months to payoff with vs without extra, total interest saved, payoff date. Reference: avg US balance $37K, std plan 10 yr.

401(k) yearly contribution + employer match calculator. Inputs: annual salary, employee contribution %, employer match formula (e.g. 100% up to 6%), 2026 IRS limit ($23,500 under 50, $31K with catch-up 50+). Output: employee, employer, total annual contribution; flag if exceeding limit; year-end balance projection (assume 7% return).

Compare Roth vs Traditional IRA tax outcomes. Inputs: current age, retirement age, annual contribution, current marginal tax rate, expected retirement tax rate, expected return. Output: end balance net of tax for each, recommendation. 2026 limit $7K (<50) / $8K (50+).

US federal income tax 2026 with progressive brackets. Inputs: filing status (single/MFJ/MFS/HoH), taxable income (or gross + standard/itemized deduction). 2026 std deduction est $15,000 single / $30,000 MFJ. Brackets 10/12/22/24/32/35/37%. Output: tax owed, effective rate, marginal rate, refund vs owed if withholding given.

Net paycheck calculator USA. Inputs: gross pay, pay frequency, filing status, allowances/W4 step 4c, state (default CA, NY, TX, FL), 401k % pretax, health insurance pretax. Compute: federal withholding (2026 brackets), FICA 6.2% SS up to $176K, Medicare 1.45% (2.35% over $200K), state tax. Output: net + breakdown.

Dave Ramsey debt snowball method. Inputs: list of up to 5 debts (balance, APR, min payment), extra monthly amount available. Method: pay min on all + extra on smallest balance. Output: payoff order, months to debt-free, total interest paid, comparison vs minimums-only.

Debt avalanche (highest APR first) calculator. Same inputs as snowball but extra goes to highest-rate debt first. Output: payoff order, months, total interest. Compare vs snowball: avalanche typically saves 1-3% but slower psychological wins.

Calculate months to pay off credit card given fixed payment. Inputs: balance, APR (avg US 2026: 22.5%), monthly payment OR target payoff months. Output: months to zero, total interest, total paid. Show min-payment trap: $5K at 22% paying min ~$100/mo = 88 months and $4,300 interest.

Refinance break-even months. Inputs: current loan (balance, rate, remaining term), new loan (rate, term, closing costs $3-5K typical). Output: monthly savings, break-even months (closing/savings), total interest saved over new term, recommendation if planning to stay > break-even.

Max home price you can afford. Inputs: gross annual income, monthly debts, down payment savings, mortgage rate (default 6.8%), term (30 yr), property tax %, insurance/yr, target DTI (28% front-end / 36% back-end). Output: max home price, monthly P&I, total monthly housing cost.

Rent vs buy comparison 5-yr horizon. Inputs: home price, down payment, mortgage rate, property tax/insurance, HOA, closing costs (buy + sell), home appreciation %/yr (default 3.5%), monthly rent, rent inflation %/yr (3%), investment return on down payment if rented (7%). Output: 5-yr net cost rent vs buy, break-even year.

Target emergency fund size. Inputs: monthly essentials (rent, food, utilities, insurance, transport, min debt payments), job stability (single income / dual / freelance), dependents. Output: recommended months (3-12), target dollar amount, months to reach at given saving rate.

Net worth = assets - liabilities. Inputs: cash/savings, investments (401k/IRA/brokerage), home equity (value - mortgage), vehicles (Kelley value), other assets, credit card debt, student loans, auto loans, other debts. Output: net worth, asset/liability breakdown, percentile vs US median by age.

Basal Metabolic Rate using Mifflin-St Jeor (most accurate). Men: BMR=10·kg+6.25·cm−5·age+5. Women: BMR=10·kg+6.25·cm−5·age−161. Inputs: sex, weight, height, age. Output: BMR kcal, TDEE × activity factor (1.2 sedentary / 1.375 light / 1.55 mod / 1.725 active / 1.9 very active).

Macro split calculator. Inputs: TDEE (or compute from BMR+activity), goal (cut −20%, maintain, lean bulk +10%), protein g/kg (1.6-2.2), fat % of cals (25-30). Output: target kcal, protein/carbs/fat in grams + %. Default: cut 1.0g protein/lb bw.

Body fat % from skinfold calipers using Jackson-Pollock 3-site (men: chest/abdominal/thigh; women: triceps/suprailiac/thigh). Inputs: sex, age, 3 skinfold mm. Output: body density, body fat %, lean mass, fat mass, classification (essential/athlete/fitness/avg/obese).

Lean body mass via Boer formula. Men: LBM=0.407·kg+0.267·cm−19.2. Women: LBM=0.252·kg+0.473·cm−48.3. Inputs: sex, weight, height. Output: LBM kg/lb, body fat mass, % LBM. Useful for medication dosing, protein targets.

5 HR zones via Karvonen + max HR (220-age, or Tanaka 208−0.7·age). Inputs: age, resting HR, max HR (optional override). Output: Z1 50-60% (recovery), Z2 60-70% (fat burn), Z3 70-80% (aerobic), Z4 80-90% (threshold), Z5 90-100% (vo2max) — bpm ranges each.

VO2 max from Cooper 12-minute run distance. Formula: VO2max = (distance_meters − 504.9) / 44.73. Inputs: 12-min distance (m or mi), sex, age. Output: VO2max ml/kg/min, fitness category by age/sex (Cooper Institute norms).

1RM estimator from sub-max set. Formulas: Epley 1RM = w·(1+reps/30); Brzycki 1RM = w·36/(37−reps); Lombardi 1RM = w·reps^0.10. Inputs: weight lifted, reps. Output: 1RM each formula + average, % tables (50/60/70/80/85/90/95% for training).

Daily water needs. Base: 35 ml/kg bodyweight. Adjust: +500-750ml per hour exercise, +500ml hot climate, +500ml during pregnancy, +700ml lactation. Inputs: weight, activity hours/day, climate, pregnancy/lactation status. Output: liters/day, oz/day, cups/day.

Daily protein g by goal. RDA 0.8 g/kg (sedentary), 1.2-1.6 (active), 1.6-2.2 (muscle gain), 1.8-2.4 (cutting + lifting). Inputs: weight, goal (sedentary/active/build/cut), age (>65: +20%). Output: grams/day, examples in food (chicken breast, eggs, tofu).

IF schedule planner. Inputs: protocol (16:8, 18:6, 20:4, OMAD), eating window start time, lifestyle. Output: fast start time, fast end time, eating window hours, expected fasted state (autophagy ~16-24h, ketosis ~12-24h). Tips: water/coffee allowed during fast.

Conception date from LMP or due date. Conception ≈ LMP + 14 days (28-day cycle). Inputs: due date OR LMP date, average cycle length. Output: estimated conception date, fertile window range (5 days), gestational age today.

Due date for IVF pregnancies. Day-3 transfer: ET + 263 days. Day-5 (blastocyst): ET + 261 days. FET: same as fresh + adjustment. Inputs: transfer date, embryo day (D3 or D5), fresh vs frozen. Output: estimated due date, gestational age, milestones (12wk, 20wk, 28wk).

Convert pregnancy weeks ↔ months ↔ trimesters. 40 wk full term ≈ 9 months 7 days. 1st tri 0-13w6d, 2nd 14-27w6d, 3rd 28-40w. Inputs: current week + day. Output: month equivalent, trimester, weeks/days remaining, percentage complete.

Daily formula/breastmilk oz by age. 0-1mo: 1.5-3 oz × 8-10 feeds. 1-3mo: 4-5 oz × 6-8. 3-6mo: 6-7 oz × 5-6. 6-12mo: 7-8 oz × 4-5 + solids. Rule: 2.5 oz × lb bodyweight/day max 32 oz. Inputs: age (weeks), weight. Output: oz/feeding, feeds/day, total oz/day.

Fertile window from cycle data. Ovulation ≈ LMP + (cycle length − 14). Fertile window: ovulation −5 to +1 day. Inputs: LMP date, average cycle length (default 28). Output: ovulation date, fertile window start/end, peak fertility days, next period expected.

Hourly wage → annual salary. Formula: hourly × hours/week × 52. Inputs: hourly rate, hours/week (default 40), weeks worked/yr (default 52, can adjust for PTO). Output: annual gross, monthly, biweekly, weekly, daily. Add overtime: 1.5× over 40h.

Annual salary → hourly equivalent. Formula: salary / (hours/week × weeks/yr). Standard: 2,080 hr/yr (40·52). Inputs: annual salary, hours/week, weeks worked. Output: hourly, daily, weekly, biweekly, monthly. Useful for freelance rate comparison.

Weekly time card calc. Inputs: 7 days × (clock-in, clock-out, lunch break minutes). Compute: daily hours, weekly total, regular vs OT (over 40). Inputs: hourly rate (optional). Output: total hours, regular hrs, OT hrs, gross pay (hourly · reg + 1.5 · OT).

Difference between two clock times. Handles overnight (end < start = +24h). Inputs: start time (HH:MM, 12/24-hr), end time, optional break minutes. Output: total hours decimal, hours:minutes, minutes total. Handles AM/PM.

% change between two numbers. Formula: ((new−old)/old)·100. Inputs: original value, new value (or % change to apply). Output: % increase/decrease, absolute difference, sign. Examples: $100→$120 = 20% increase; $100→$80 = 20% decrease.
Simplify ratios via GCD. Inputs: ratio A:B (or A:B:C). Output: simplified form, decimal value, percentage equivalent, equivalent ratios. Bonus: scale by factor (e.g. 4:6 scaled to total 100 = 40:60).

Compound interest with monthly contributions. Formula A=P(1+r/n)^(nt) + PMT·[(1+r/n)^(nt)−1]/(r/n). Inputs: initial, monthly contribution, annual rate %, years, compounding frequency (annual/qtr/monthly/daily). Output: end balance, total contribs, total interest, year-by-year breakdown.

Road trip fuel cost. Inputs: trip distance (miles or km), vehicle MPG (or l/100km), gas price/gal (or /L). Output: gallons needed, total fuel cost, cost per person if splitting (split among N riders). Useful: avg US 2026 gas $3.45/gal, avg car 28 MPG.

Drive time given distance + average speed + breaks. Inputs: distance, avg speed (default 65 mph hwy), break duration/frequency (15 min every 2-3 hrs), departure time. Output: total drive time, total trip time with breaks, ETA, recommended overnight if > 10 hrs.

Split hotel cost across travelers/nights. Inputs: total hotel cost, number of nights, number of travelers, custom split (some per nights stayed). Output: per person, per night, per person/night. Handles uneven nights (e.g. person leaves early).

Tip recommendation by state norms. Inputs: bill amount, state (NY/CA/TX/etc has 18-20% norm vs lower states 15-18%), service (good/excellent), party size (auto-grat 18% if 6+). Output: tip $, total bill, per-person split. Compare state norms.

Scale a recipe by servings. Inputs: original servings, desired servings, list of up to 10 ingredients (amount + unit). Output: scaled amounts. Smart unit handling (cups→tbsp if <1/4 cup, oz→lb if >16 oz). Note: baking ingredients (eggs, leavening) don't scale linearly.

Convert °F ↔ °C ↔ Gas Mark. F=C·9/5+32. Reference table: 250°F=120°C=Gas½, 350°F=180°C=Gas4, 425°F=220°C=Gas7. Inputs: temperature + source unit. Output: all 3 units. Notes: convection ovens run 25°F (15°C) lower.

Baker's % for bread formulas. Flour=100%, others % of flour. Inputs: target dough weight OR flour amount, hydration %, salt % (typ 2%), yeast % (typ 1% instant), other (oil, sugar) %. Output: each ingredient in grams, total dough weight, hydration class (lean/standard/wet).

Coffee:water ratio for brew methods. Inputs: brew method (drip 1:16-17, French press 1:15, AeroPress 1:14, espresso 1:2, cold brew 1:8), output cups (oz or ml). Output: coffee grams, water grams/oz, grind size recommendation. SCA gold cup standard.

BTC P&L calc. Inputs: amount BTC bought, buy price, sell price (or current), holding period, fee % (typ 0.1-1%). Output: cost basis, proceeds net of fees, profit/loss USD, % return, annualized return, tax-relevant short vs long-term (>1 yr). Useful for any crypto.

ETH gas cost calc. Fee = gasUsed · gasPrice (gwei) · ETH price. Inputs: tx type (transfer 21K gas, ERC-20 transfer 65K, Uniswap swap 150K, NFT mint 200K, complex DeFi 500K), gas price gwei, ETH price USD. Output: gas cost ETH + USD, L2 alt cost (Arbitrum/Base ~$0.10-0.50).

GPU cloud rental cost (Vast.ai, RunPod, Lambda). Inputs: GPU type (RTX 4090 ~$0.40/hr, A100 ~$1.10/hr, H100 ~$2.50/hr), hours/day, days/month, electricity cost if owning ($0.12/kWh × ~400W × hrs). Output: monthly rental, monthly own (RTX 4090 $1800 amortized 24mo + electricity), break-even month.

OpenAI API monthly spend estimate. Inputs: model (GPT-4o $5/M in, $15/M out; GPT-4o-mini $0.15/M, $0.60/M; o3 $15/M, $60/M), avg input tokens/req, avg output, requests/day, batch API discount (50% off if applicable). Output: $/day, $/month, breakdown in/out, comparison vs Claude/Gemini.

Staking yield projection. Inputs: token (ETH 3.5%, SOL 6%, ADA 3%, ATOM 14%, DOT 11%, custom APR), amount staked, period (months), compound frequency, validator commission %. Output: rewards earned (token + USD at current price), end stake, APR vs APY effective.

Wedding budget allocation by category. Total → venue 40%, catering 28%, photo/video 12%, attire 5%, flowers 8%, music 7%, etc. Inputs: total budget, guest count, region (avg US 2026: $35K, urban: $50K+). Output: $ per category, per-guest cost, contingency 10% suggested.

Drinks for event. Rule: 1 drink/hour/guest first 2 hrs, 0.5/hr after. Mix: 50% wine, 30% beer, 20% spirits (typical). Inputs: guests, hours, event type (wedding/cocktail/casual). Output: bottles wine, beers, spirit liters, total drinks, cost estimate.

Catering cost per guest. Inputs: meal type (buffet $30-50, plated $60-120, family-style $40-80, food truck $20-35), guests, gratuity (18-22%), bar (open $25/head/3hrs, beer/wine $15). Output: total + per head + tax/tip breakdown. US 2026 averages.

Set freelance rate from target income. Inputs: desired annual income, business expenses/yr (software, hardware, healthcare, taxes), billable hours/week (typ 25-30 of 40), weeks worked (45-48 after PTO). Formula: rate = (income + expenses + tax 25-30%) / billable hrs. Output: hourly + project-based equivalents.

Self-employment tax on side income (USA). SE tax: 15.3% (12.4% SS up to $176K + 2.9% Medicare). Plus federal income tax bracket. Inputs: side income, expenses, marginal fed bracket, state. Deductions: half SE tax, qualified biz income (QBI 20%). Output: SE tax, fed tax, total tax, net keep. Quarterly payment estimate.

Compare simple I=P·r·t vs compound A=P(1+r/n)^(nt). Inputs: principal, annual rate, years, compounding (monthly default). Output: simple interest total, compound interest total, difference, year-by-year side-by-side. Example: $10K at 7% × 30y → simple $21K vs compound $76K.

Monthly payout from annuity/lump-sum given lifespan. Formula: PMT = PV·r / (1−(1+r)^−n). Inputs: lump sum, annual rate, payout years (or until age). Output: monthly payout, total received, interest earned during payout. Use for retirement planning.

Monthly savings to reach goal. Inputs: target amount, current balance, time horizon (months), expected APY. Formula PMT = (FV−PV·(1+r)^n)·r/((1+r)^n−1). Output: monthly contribution needed, total contributed, interest earned, % from interest.

Cuota mensual hipoteca fórmula francesa M=P·i(1+i)^n/((1+i)^n−1). Inputs: precio vivienda, entrada %, plazo (15/20/25/30 años), tasa anual (default 7% LATAM 2026), seguros mensuales. Output: cuota mensual, intereses totales, capital amortizado año 1 y año 5, fecha fin pago.

Préstamo personal sistema francés. Inputs: monto, plazo meses (12/24/36/48/60), TNA (default 60-90% LATAM). Output: cuota mensual, total a pagar, intereses, CFT estimado (sumando IVA 21% sobre intereses + seguros 1-3%). Tabla amortización primeros 6 meses.

IMC = peso(kg) / altura(m)². Categorías OMS: <18.5 bajo peso, 18.5-24.9 normal, 25-29.9 sobrepeso, 30-34.9 obesidad I, 35-39.9 II, ≥40 III. Inputs: peso, altura. Output: IMC, categoría, peso ideal rango, kg para llegar al rango normal. Limitaciones: no diferencia músculo de grasa.

Tasa metabólica basal Mifflin-St Jeor. Hombres: TMB=10·kg+6.25·cm−5·edad+5. Mujeres: −161 al final. Inputs: sexo, peso, altura, edad. Output: TMB kcal, GET (gasto energético total) según factor actividad (1.2 sedentario, 1.55 moderado, 1.9 muy activo). Base para dietas.

Macros según objetivo. Inputs: GET (o calcular desde TMB+actividad), objetivo (déficit −20%, mantenimiento, volumen +10%), proteína g/kg (1.6-2.2), grasa % calorías (25-30). Output: kcal objetivo, gramos proteína/carbos/grasa + %, ejemplos de comidas.

% grasa por pliegues cutáneos Jackson-Pollock 3 zonas (hombres: pectoral/abdominal/muslo; mujeres: tríceps/suprailíaca/muslo). Inputs: sexo, edad, 3 pliegues mm. Output: densidad corporal, % grasa, masa magra, masa grasa, clasificación (esencial/atleta/fitness/promedio/obesidad).

5 zonas FC método Karvonen. FCmáx = 220−edad (o Tanaka 208−0.7·edad). FCR = FCmáx − FC reposo. Zona = FCR·% + FC reposo. Inputs: edad, FC reposo. Output: Z1 (50-60%), Z2 (60-70%), Z3 (70-80%), Z4 (80-90%), Z5 (90-100%) en bpm.

VO2 máx test Cooper 12 min. Fórmula: VO2max = (distancia_metros − 504.9) / 44.73. Inputs: distancia 12 min (m o km), sexo, edad. Output: VO2 máx ml/kg/min, categoría según edad/sexo (Cooper Institute), comparativa percentil.

Estimación 1RM desde serie submáxima. Epley: 1RM=peso·(1+reps/30); Brzycki: 1RM=peso·36/(37−reps). Inputs: peso, repeticiones (≤10 ideal). Output: 1RM Epley, 1RM Brzycki, promedio, tablas % (50/60/70/80/85/90/95%) para programación.

Litros agua/día. Base 35 ml/kg. Suma: ejercicio +500-750 ml/h, clima caluroso +500 ml, embarazo +300 ml, lactancia +700 ml. Inputs: peso, horas ejercicio/día, clima, estado especial. Output: litros/día, vasos (250 ml), botellitas (500 ml). Fuentes: OMS, IOM.

Gramos proteína/día. Sedentario 0.8 g/kg, activo 1.2-1.6, ganancia muscular 1.6-2.2, déficit + entrenamiento 1.8-2.4. Inputs: peso, objetivo, edad (>65: +20%). Output: gramos/día, ejemplos en alimentos (pollo, huevos, atún, tofu, legumbres).

Planificador ayuno intermitente. Inputs: protocolo (16:8, 18:6, 20:4, OMAD), hora inicio ventana de comer, estilo vida. Output: hora fin de ayuno, hora inicio ayuno, ventana comer en horas, fases esperadas (autofagia ~16-24h, cetosis ~12-24h).

Ventana fértil desde ciclo. Ovulación = FUM + (largo ciclo − 14). Ventana fértil: ovulación −5 a +1 día. Inputs: fecha última menstruación, largo ciclo (default 28). Output: fecha ovulación, ventana fértil inicio/fin, días pico, próxima menstruación esperada.

FPP por regla Naegele: FUM + 280 días (40 semanas). Ajuste si ciclo ≠28: ±días. Inputs: FUM, largo ciclo. Output: FPP, semanas gestacionales hoy, hitos (12 sem fin 1er tri, 20 sem ecografía morfológica, 24 sem viabilidad, 37 término temprano).

Fecha probable concepción. Concepción ≈ FUM + 14 días (ciclo 28). Inputs: FPP O FUM, largo ciclo. Output: fecha concepción estimada, ventana posible (5 días), edad gestacional hoy. Útil para identificar evento conceptivo.

Conversión semanas ↔ meses ↔ trimestres. 40 sem ≈ 9 meses 7 días. 1er tri 0-13s6d, 2do 14-27s6d, 3ro 28-40s. Inputs: semana actual + día. Output: mes equivalente, trimestre, semanas/días que faltan, % completado. Fuente: ACOG/OMS.

Edad gestacional por LCC (longitud cráneo-rabadilla) o DBP. LCC primer trimestre Hadlock: edad_gest = 8.052·√LCC + 23.73 (días). Inputs: LCC mm O FUM. Output: edad gestacional semanas+días, FPP corregida si discrepancia >7 días.

Interés compuesto con aporte mensual. A=P(1+r/n)^(nt) + PMT·[(1+r/n)^(nt)−1]/(r/n). Inputs: capital inicial, aporte mensual, tasa anual %, años, frecuencia capitalización (anual/trim/mensual/diaria). Output: balance final, total aportado, interés ganado, evolución por año.
Interés simple I=C·i·t. Inputs: capital, tasa anual %, plazo (días/meses/años). Output: interés total, monto final, comparativa vs interés compuesto a mismo plazo (diferencia significativa >2 años).

% cambio entre dos números: ((nuevo−viejo)/viejo)·100. Inputs: valor inicial, valor final (o % a aplicar). Output: % aumento/disminución, diferencia absoluta, signo. Ej: $1000→$1200 = 20% aumento; $100→$80 = 20% disminución.

Regla de tres compuesta (3 magnitudes). Permite resolver problemas con 3 variables relacionadas (ej: 5 obreros 8 horas/día construyen 100m muro en 10 días → cuánto demoran 8 obreros 10 horas/día para 200m). Inputs: 3 magnitudes con relación directa/inversa. Output: valor incógnita, paso a paso explicado.

Estadística descriptiva. Inputs: lista de números (separados por coma o salto línea). Output: media aritmética, mediana, moda(s), rango (max−min), desv estándar muestral, varianza, n total. Útil para promedio escolar, control calidad, análisis encuestas.

Desviación estándar muestral s = √[Σ(x−x̄)²/(n−1)] y poblacional σ = √[Σ(x−μ)²/n]. Inputs: lista valores, tipo (muestra o población). Output: media, varianza, desv estándar, coeficiente variación %, distribución normal aproximada (intervalos ±1σ, ±2σ, ±3σ).

Conversor distancia y velocidad. 1 mi=1.609 km, 1 nudo=1.852 km/h, 1 km/h=0.621 mph. Inputs: valor + unidad origen (mi, km, m, ft, yd, nudo, km/h, mph). Output: equivalencia en todas las unidades, tabla referencia (carretera 60 mph=97 km/h, avión 500 nudos=926 km/h).

Conversión tazas/cucharadas/gramos/onzas según ingrediente (densidad). Harina: 1 taza = 120g. Azúcar: 1 taza = 200g. Mantequilla: 1 taza = 227g. Inputs: ingrediente, cantidad, unidad origen, unidad destino. Output: equivalencia precisa, tabla de referencia.

Comparador SAC vs Price para financiamento imóvel BR. Inputs: valor imóvel, entrada %, prazo (até 35 anos), taxa anual (Caixa SBPE 2026 ~10.5%), TR estimada. Output: 1ª e última prestação SAC + Price, total juros pago cada sistema, recomendação. SAC: amortização constante, prestação decrescente.

CDC veículo prestação fixa Tabela Price. Inputs: valor veículo, entrada, prazo meses (24/36/48/60), taxa mensal (default 1.8% a.m. 2026 = ~24% a.a.), IOF. Output: prestação mensal, total pago, juros, CET aproximado. Comparar com consórcio (sem juros mas com taxa adm).

IR PF 2026 BR. Tabela mensal: até R$2.259,20 isento, 7.5%, 15%, 22.5%, 27.5% (acima R$4.664,68). Desconto simplificado 25% até R$16.754,34/ano. Inputs: salário bruto anual, dependentes, INSS pago, despesas dedutíveis (educação, saúde, previdência). Output: IR devido cada modalidade, recomendação.

13° salário CLT. 1ª parcela 50% bruto até 30/nov, 2ª parcela com descontos (INSS + IRRF) até 20/dez. Inputs: salário bruto, meses trabalhados no ano, dependentes IR. Output: 13° bruto proporcional, INSS, IRRF, líquido total + 1ª e 2ª parcela.

Férias CLT 30 dias + 1/3 constitucional. Inputs: salário bruto, dias gozados (10/15/20/30), abono pecuniário (vender 1/3 = 10 dias, opcional), dependentes. Output: salário férias bruto, abono pecuniário se aplicável, INSS, IRRF, líquido a receber, comparar gozar 30 vs vender 10.

Rescisão CLT por tipo (sem justa causa, pedido demissão, acordo). Inputs: salário, data admissão, data rescisão, tipo rescisão, aviso prévio (trabalhado/indenizado). Output: saldo salário, aviso prévio, 13° proporcional, férias proporcionais + 1/3, FGTS multa 40% (só sem justa causa) ou 20% (acordo), guia GRRF.

Multa FGTS 40% rescisão sem justa causa BR. Inputs: salário bruto médio, anos trabalhados, depósitos FGTS estimados (8% mensal sobre bruto). Output: saldo FGTS estimado, multa 40% (ou 20% acordo), total a receber, comparar com saque-aniversário (perde direito multa).

IMC = peso(kg)/altura(m)². Categorias OMS: <18.5 magreza, 18.5-24.9 normal, 25-29.9 sobrepeso, 30-34.9 obesidade I, 35-39.9 II, ≥40 III. Inputs: peso, altura. Output: IMC, classificação, peso ideal, kg até classe normal, ressalvas (não diferencia músculo de gordura).

Taxa metabólica basal Mifflin-St Jeor. Homens: TMB=10·kg+6.25·cm−5·idade+5. Mulheres: −161 ao final. Inputs: sexo, peso, altura, idade. Output: TMB kcal, GET pelo fator atividade (1.2/1.375/1.55/1.725/1.9). Base para dietas, déficit/superávit.

Macros pelo objetivo. Inputs: GET (ou calcular de TMB+atividade), objetivo (cutting −20%, manutenção, bulking +10%), proteína g/kg (1.6-2.2), gordura % (25-30). Output: kcal alvo, gramas P/C/G + %, exemplos alimentos brasileiros (frango, ovo, arroz, feijão, azeite).

DPP regra Naegele: DUM + 280 dias. Inputs: data última menstruação, duração ciclo (default 28). Output: DPP, semana gestacional hoje, marcos (12 sem fim 1° tri, 20 sem ultrassom morfológico, 28 sem início 3° tri, 37 sem termo precoce). Referência: FEBRASGO.

Período fértil pelo ciclo. Ovulação ≈ DUM + (duração ciclo − 14). Janela fértil: ovulação −5 a +1 dia. Inputs: DUM, duração ciclo. Output: dia ovulação, janela fértil início/fim, dias pico, próxima menstruação. Útil para planejamento ou contracepção natural.

Juros compostos com aporte mensal. M=C(1+i)^n + PMT·[(1+i)^n−1]/i. Inputs: capital inicial, aporte mensal, taxa anual %, anos, frequência (anual/mensal). Output: montante final, total aportado, juros ganhos, evolução ano a ano. Comparar Selic 11% vs CDB 110% CDI.

Comparador CDB vs Poupança vs Tesouro Selic 12 meses BR. Inputs: valor investido, prazo meses, % CDI do CDB (100/110/120%), Selic atual (11% 2026). Tributação CDB: IR regressivo 22.5% até 6m → 15% após 24m, IOF primeiros 30 dias. Poupança isenta. Output: rendimento líquido cada um.

Cálculo aposentadoria INSS 2026 BR. Regras: idade 65H/62M + 15 anos contribuição, ou tempo contribuição (35H/30M) + transição. Inputs: idade, tempo contribuição, salários últimos 12 meses, sexo. Output: regra mais vantajosa, % média salários (60% + 2% por ano que excede 20 anos), valor benefício (teto R$8.157,41 2026).

FIRE (Financial Independence Retire Early) target. Rule: 25× annual expenses (4% safe withdrawal rate). Inputs: annual expenses, current invested, monthly savings, expected real return (6-7%), target retirement age. Output: FIRE number, years to FI, gap to target. Variants: Lean FIRE 20×, Fat FIRE 33×, Coast FIRE.

Monthly passive income from portfolio. Inputs: portfolio size, allocation (% bonds 4%, dividend stocks 3%, REITs 5%, HYSA 4.5%, T-Bills 4.8%), withdrawal strategy (yield-only vs 4% rule). Output: monthly income, annual yield, taxes if non-tax-advantaged. Useful for FIRE planning.
